expanded_rules.name: wp_flood_test

pass_fail_outputs.pass: flood_test_duration_hr >= 24 AND water_depth_in >= 2 AND drain_plugged==true AND no_leaks_detected

expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Plug all drains, fill to 2-inch depth, hold 24 hours minimum. Inspect below-slab areas during test. Document with timestamped photos.

expanded_rules.name: wp_primer_coverage
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Check primer for tackiness before membrane application. Verify coverage rate against TDS. No application below 40F or above 100F.

expanded_rules.name: sbs_torch_temp
expanded_rules.citation: NRCA Roofing Manual / Barrett/Siplast Application Guide
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Inspect bleed-out bead at each lap. Minimum 1/4-inch continuous bead. No charring of granules or substrate. Pull-back test at corners.

expanded_rules.name: tpo_pvc_weld_width
expanded_rules.citation: FM Global DS 1-29 / Carlisle/GAF Application Guide
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Probe weld with cotter pin tool. Minimum 1.5-inch continuous weld. No open seams. Cut 6-inch sample per 500 LF for peel test.

expanded_rules.name: avb_lap_tape
expanded_rules.citation: ASTM E2357 / Henry Blueskin Application Guide
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Verify minimum 3-inch lap. Confirm tape centered on lap seam. Press-roll tape firmly. No fishmouths or lifted edges within 48 hours.

expanded_rules.name: avb_transition_continuity
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Trace AVB at all transitions: window, door, roof, floor. Confirm tape or membrane terminates into compatible substrate. No bridging over gaps > 1/8 inch.

expanded_rules.name: fp_density_verification
expanded_rules.citation: ASTM E605 / UL Fire Resistance Directory
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Cut samples per ASTM E605. Minimum 3 x 3-inch sample per 10,000 SF. Weigh and calculate density. Record against UL listing minimum.

expanded_rules.name: fp_adhesion_cohesion
expanded_rules.citation: ASTM E736 / E760 / UL Fire Resistance Directory
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Perform adhesion and cohesion pull tests per ASTM E736/E760. Document failure mode and load. Reject if cohesive failure below UL minimum.

expanded_rules.name: expansion_joint_clearance_wp

pass_fail_outputs.pass: cover_width_in >= 2x_gap AND membrane_unbonded_both_sides AND bellows_depth_in >= gap_in

expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Confirm membrane is not adhered to both sides of joint. Measure bellows depth. Cover width must be minimum 2x structural gap.

expanded_rules.name: drain_outlet_protection

pass_fail_outputs.pass: dome_installed AND fabric_present AND torque_correct AND flashing_ply_width_in >= 24
pass_fail_outputs.fail: no_dome OR no_fabric OR incorrect_torque OR short_flashing

expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Verify dome or strainer in place. Confirm clamping ring torque per manufacturer. Flashing ply minimum 24-inch extension beyond drain flange.

expanded_rules.name: protection_board_coverage
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Confirm protection board fully covers membrane before any overburden. Tape all joints. No penetrations from overburden installation.

expanded_rules.name: firestop_at_wp_penetration

pass_fail_outputs.pass: ul_system_match AND collar_installed AND sealant_depth_in >= 1 AND annular_space_in <= ul_max
pass_fail_outputs.fail: no_ul_match OR no_collar OR insufficient_sealant OR oversized_annular

expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Verify UL system number matches sleeve size and pipe type. Confirm collar installed per listing. Measure sealant depth. Annular space within UL tolerance.

expanded_rules.name: sheet_membrane_corner_patch
expanded_rules.inspection_prompt: Inspect all inside and outside corners for pre-formed patch or stripping plies. Minimum 12-inch coverage each direction. No bridging or fishmouths.
